steps.description: The `Legal Name` is the official registered name of the church, if different from the common name. It is displayed in the header of each church card on the public `/locations` page and on the `/home` page.
steps.label: Legal Name
steps.title: Legal Name

steps.description:
Check `Is Group` if this church has multiple locations or branches.
Marking a church as a group allows other churches to be linked under it via the `Parent Church` field. The public `/locations` page displays the root (group) church alongside all of its sub-churches.
steps.label: Is Group
steps.title: Is Group

steps.description:
If this church is a branch or campus of another, select the parent church here.
This church will then appear as a sub-location under the parent on the public `/locations` page.
steps.label: Parent Church
steps.title: Parent Church

steps.description:
Link a physical address to this church.
The address record can be created directly from the drop-down.
steps.label: Address
steps.title: Address

steps.description:
A short statement of the church's purpose or calling.
It appears in the footer of each church card on the public `/locations` page and in the footer of the `/home` page for the root church.
steps.label: Mission Statement
steps.title: Mission Statement

steps.description:
A description of the church shown in the body of each church card on the public `/locations` page, and in the main content area of the `/home` page for the root church.
It is also the default content for the `/about` page.
steps.label: About
steps.title: About
